zh.lifeSummary: 當Gary Lawrence Cooke於1230年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Sir Alexander Cooke30歲，母親Lettice Cornelious27歲。他於1260年與Lady Stacie Kilpie在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1275年在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gary Lawrence Cooke于1230年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Cooke30岁，母亲Lettice Cornelious27岁。他于1260年与Lady Stacie Kilpie在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1275年在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Gary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of a surname, which is probably derived from a Norman personal name of Continental Germanic origin, a short form of any of the various compound names beginning with gar ‘spear’. One bearer of this surname was the American industrialist Elbert Henry Gary ( 1846–1927 ), who gave his name to the steel town of Gary, Indiana (chartered in 1906 ). In this town was born the theatrical agent Nan Collins , who suggested Gary as a stage name for her client Frank J. Cooper , who thus became Gary Cooper ( 1901–61 ). His film career caused the name to become enormously popular from the 1930s to the present day. Its popularity has been maintained by the cricketer Gary Sobers ( b. 1936 ; in his case it is in fact a pet form of Garfield ) and the footballer Gary Lineker ( b. 1960 ). It is now often taken as a pet form of Gareth .

variants.name: Garry
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gary  , influenced by   Barry .

nameMeanings.name: Lawrence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gary Lawrence Cooke was born in 1230, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Alexander Cooke, was 30 and his mother, Lettice Cornelious, was 27. He married Lady Stacie Kilpie in 1260, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1275, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gary Lawrence Cooke est né en 1230, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Cooke, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lettice Cornelious, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Stacie Kilpie en 1260, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1275, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gary Lawrence Cooke 1230 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Cooke 30 und seine Mutter Lettice Cornelious 27. Er hat 1260 in Yorkshire, England Lady Stacie Kilpie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gary Lawrence Cooke è nato il nel 1230 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Cooke, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lettice Cornelious, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Stacie Kilpie nel 1260, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1275, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Gary Lawrence Cooke(이)가 1230년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Cooke(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lettice Cornelious(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1260년 영국 요르크실르에서 Lady Stacie Kilpie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1275년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gary Lawrence Cooke родился в 1230 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Cooke было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lettice Cornelious, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Stacie Kilpie в 1260 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1275 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.
